2026-04-21T16:27:41.0628578Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-21T16:27:41.0629005Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-21T16:27:41.0629362Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-21T16:27:41.0629672Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T16:27:41.0629906Z [36;1m[0m

2026-04-21T16:30:29.3510961Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-21T16:28:48.117339283Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58450,\"title\":\"[Tools] Docs: Add missing AZC0012.md and link rules table in README\",\"body\":\"## Documentation Gap\\n\\n**Package:** `Azure.SdkAnalyzers`\\n**Service directory:** `sdk/tools/Azure.SdkAnalyzers/`\\n**Triggered by:** PR #58407 by `@m-redding`\\n\\n## What Changed\\n\\nPR #58407 updated the `Azure.SdkAnalyzers` README and CHANGELOG, adding entries for AZC0020 and AZC0101 and simplifying the README for this internal-only package. It also added individual documentation files `docs/AZC0020.md` and `docs/AZC0101.md`.\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- `docs/AZC0012.md` does not exist — AZC0012 (Avoid single word type names) is the only implemented rule without its own dedicated documentation file. AZC0020 and AZC0101 both have individual `docs/.md` files.\\n- The README rules table lists all three rules (`AZC0012`, `AZC0020`, `AZC0101`) but does not hyperlink any of them to their individual documentation pages. AZC0020 and AZC0101 have standalone docs that should be linked; AZC0012 needs its own doc file created first.\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Create `docs/AZC0012.md`\\n\\n**Path:** `sdk/tools/Azure.SdkAnalyzers/docs/AZC0012.md`\\n**Action:** Create the file\\n\\nUse `sdk/tools/Azure.SdkAnalyzers/docs/AZC0020.md` and `sdk/tools/Azure.SdkAnalyzers/docs/AZC0101.md` as templates. The content should include:\\n\\n```markdown\\n# AZC0012: Avoid single word type names\\n\\n| Property | Value |\\n|----------|-------|\\n| **Severity** | Warning |\\n| **Code fix** | No |\\n\\n## Cause\\n\\nPublic types (classes, interfaces, or structs) in Azure SDK namespaces (`Azure.*`, excluding `Azure.Core.*`) use single-word names, which are too generic and risk colliding with BCL types or types from other libraries.\\n\\n## Why this matters\\n\\nSingle-word type names such as `Format`, `Manager`, or `Options` are highly likely to conflict with types already defined in the .NET BCL or other libraries, leading to ambiguous references and confusing API surfaces.\\n\\n## How to fix\\n\\nUse descriptive multi-word names. Add a prefix or suffix that describes the purpose or domain of the type:\\n\\n```\\nnamespace Azure.Data.Tables\\n{\\n-   public class Format { }\\n+   public class TableDataFormat { }\\n}\\n```\\n\\n## When to suppress warnings\\n\\nSuppress only if the type name is genuinely well-known and intentionally mirrors a BCL type for compatibility reasons. Document the justification:\\n\\n```\\n#pragma warning disable AZC0012 // Justified: intentional alias for well-known BCL type\\npublic class Stream { }\\n#pragma warning restore AZC0012\\n```\\n\\n## Example of a violation\\n\\n```\\nnamespace Azure.Data.Tables\\n{\\n    public class Format { } // ❌ single-word name\\n}\\n```\\n\\n## Example of how to fix\\n\\n```\\nnamespace Azure.Data.Tables\\n{\\n    public class TableDataFormat { } // ✅ descriptive multi-word name\\n}\\n```\\n\\n## Notes\\n\\n- Only public types in Azure SDK namespaces (starting with `Azure.` except `Azure.Core.*`) are analyzed.\\n- Interface names starting with `I` have the prefix ignored (e.g., `IClient` is treated as single-word).\\n- Nested types are not analyzed.\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Update the README rules table to link to individual docs\\n\\n**Path:** `sdk/tools/Azure.SdkAnalyzers/README.md`\\n**Action:** Edit — replace the existing `## Implemented Rules` table\\n\\nCurrent table:\\n\\n```markdown\\n| Rule | Description | Fix |\\n|------|-------------|-----|\\n| **AZC0012** | Avoid single word type names | — |\\n| **AZC0020** | Propagate CancellationToken to RequestContext | — |\\n| **AZC0101** | Do not use `ConfigureAwait(true)` | ✅ |\\n```\\n\\nReplace with:\\n\\n```markdown\\n| Rule | Description | Fix |\\n|------|-------------|-----|\\n| [**AZC0012**](docs/AZC0012.md) | Avoid single word type names | — |\\n| [**AZC0020**](docs/AZC0020.md) | Propagate CancellationToken to RequestContext | — |\\n| [**AZC0101**](docs/AZC0101.md) | Do not use `ConfigureAwait(true)` | ✅ |\\n```\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\\n\\nThe README at `sdk/tools/Azure.SdkAnalyzers/README.md` is intentionally simplified for an internal-only analyzer package and does not follow the standard customer-facing template. The current sections are appropriate. No further section changes are required.\\n\\n### Step 4: Validate\\n\\nRun these commands in order. Each must succeed before proceeding:\\n\\n1. `dotnet build sdk/tools/Azure.SdkAnalyzers/`\\n2. `dotnet test sdk/tools/Azure.SdkAnalyzers/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\\n3. `dotnet format sdk/tools/Azure.SdkAnalyzers/`\\n\\n\\u0026gt; Note: `Update-Snippets.ps1` and `Export-API.ps1` are not required here — no public API surface changed and no snippet placeholders exist in this README.\\n\\n\\n\\n## Next Steps\\n\\n\\u0026gt; [!TIP]\\n\\u0026gt; **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **`@copilot`** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n\\u0026gt; [!WARNING]\\n\\u0026gt; \\n\\u0026gt; \\u003cstrong\\u003e⚠️ Firewall blocked 2 domains\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\u0026gt;\\n\\u0026gt; The following domains were blocked by the firewall during workflow execution:\\n\\u0026gt;\\n\\u0026gt; - `pkgs.dev.azure.com`\\n\\u0026gt; - `releaseassets.githubusercontent.com`\\n\\u0026gt;\\n\\u0026gt; To allow these domains, add them to the `network.allowed` list in your workflow frontmatter:\\n\\u0026gt;\\n\\u0026gt; ```yaml\\n\\u0026gt; network:\\n\\u0026gt;   allowed:\\n\\u0026gt;     - defaults\\n\\u0026gt;     - \\u0026#34;pkgs.dev.azure.com\\u0026#34;\\n\\u0026gt;     - \\u0026#34;releaseassets.githubusercontent.com\\u0026#34;\\n\\u0026gt; ```\\n\\u0026gt;\\n\\u0026gt; See [Network Configuration](https://github.github.com/gh-aw/reference/network/) for more information.\\n\\u0026gt;\\n\\u0026gt; \\n\\n\\n\\u0026gt; Generated by [Update Docs](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/actions/runs/24733613564/agentic_workflow) · ● 501.9K · [◷](https://github.com/search?q=repo%3AAzure%2Fazure-sdk-for-net+is%3Aissue+%22gh-aw-workflow-call-id%3A+Azure%2Fazure-sdk-for-net%2Fupdate-samples-and-docs%22\\u0026amp;type=issues)\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58450\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"github-actions[bot]\",\"id\":41898282,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/apps/github-actions\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/in/15368?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"NONE\",\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":0,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":0},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-21T16:25:42Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-21T16:25:42Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
